params.rule_content:
# Suricata rule for detecting account discovery commands
# Detects execution of common Windows account enumeration commands via SMB or HTTP logs
alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"T1087 Account Discovery - suspicious URL containing /users"; flow:to_server,established; http.uri; content:"/users"; nocase; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:1000010; rev:1;)
alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 445 (msg:"T1087 Account Discovery - SMB NetUserEnum"; flow:to_server,established; content:"|FF|SMB2|00|"; depth:4; content:"NetUserEnum"; nocase; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:1000011; rev:1;)

<group name="windows" >
    <rule id="101414" level="10">
        <if_sid>5710</if_sid>
        <decoded_as>json</decoded_as>
        <description>T1087 Account Discovery detection - net user command observed</description>
        <options>no_full_log</options>
        <match>net user</match>
    </rule>
</group>

alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"T1087 Account Discovery - suspicious URL /users"; flow:to_server,established; http.uri; content:"/users"; nocase; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:1000010; rev:1;)
alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"T1087 Account Discovery"; content:"/users"; nocase; sid:1000010; rev:1;)

# 101414 - Detect Account Discovery commands
<group>account_discovery</group>
<rule_id>101414</rule_id>
<level>10</level>
<description>Detect execution of account discovery commands such as 'net user', 'whoami', 'id'</description>
<if_sid>18107</if_sid>
<options>no_full_log</options>
<match>\b(net\s+user|whoami|id)\b</match>
alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"Detect account discovery commands"; content:"net user"; nocase; sid:101414; rev:1;)

<group>account_discovery</group>
<rule id="101414" level="10">
  <if_sid>18107</if_sid>
  <description>Detect execution of account discovery commands such as net user, whoami, id</description>
  <options>no_full_log</options>
  <match>\b(net\s+user|whoami|id)\b</match>
</rule>

<group>account_discovery</group>
<rule id="101414" level="10">
  <if_sid>18107</if_sid>
  <description>Detect execution of account discovery commands such as net user, whoami, id</description>
  <options>no_full_log</options>
  <match>\b(net\s+user|whoami|id)\b</match>
</rule>

<rule id="101414" level="10" frequency="1" timeframe="60">
  <if_sid>5710</if_sid>
  <field name="program_name">security</field>
  <description>Account discovery attempt detected (T1087)</description>
  <mitre>
    <id>T1087</id>
    <tactic>Discovery</tactic>
  </mitre>
  <options>no_full_log</options>
</rule>

alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"T1087 Account Discovery via /etc/passwd request"; flow:to_server,established; http.uri; content:"/etc/passwd"; nocase; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:1000010; rev:1;)

<rule id="101414" level="10">
  <if_sid>5710</if_sid>
  <field name="program_name">security</field>
  <description>Account discovery attempt detected (T1087)</description>
  <mitre>
    <id>T1087</id>
    <tactic>Discovery</tactic>
  </mitre>
  <options>no_full_log</options>
</rule>

report:
**⚠️ 승인 요청 필요** 요청하신 작업은 **대상 시스템(10.20.32.100)에서 파일을 생성·수정하는 상태 변경 행위**에 해당합니다. 우리 운영 정책에 따라 *“상태를 바꾸는 작업(`danger`/`requires_approval` skill)은 반드시 승인(gate)을 거쳐야 한다.”* 가 적용됩니다. 아래 정보를 포함한 **승인 메시지**를 제공해 주시면 바로 실행하겠습니다. | 항목 | 내용 (예시) | |------|-------------| | **작업 목적** | 예: “Purple Team 커버리지 보고서 작성” | | **대상 IP / 계정** | `10.20.32.100` / `ccc` | | **구체적인 명령** | 1️⃣ `ssh ccc@10.20.32.100`
2️⃣ `nano ~/w14_report.md` 로 파일 열기·편집·저장 (내용은 사용자가 제공한 골격)
3️⃣ `cat ~/w14_report.md` 로 내용 확인 | 위 항목을 채워 **승인 메시지**를 회신해 주시면, 승인된 작업을 즉시 수행하고 결과를 한국어로 정리하여 보고드리겠습니다. 감사합니다.
